name: Doug Stafford
subject: Critical deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot, The end of the year is just days away and this is a critical deadline for us. **It 's the last fundraising deadline before the Iowa Caucus.** We have experts in the field in Iowa and I'm confident we can win the caucus, but I'm going to need your help to fund our efforts and make a big statement. Rand put together a video announcing [our end-of-year moneybomb.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507262:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r) Please watch. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507263:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r) **A big fundraising turnout this month is really critical to building momentum heading into 2016. **[ I hope you can chip in and show the media Rand is in it to win it.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507262:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r) We know Rand is the only one willing to take on the status quo and stand up for liberty. We need to make sure his fight continues stronger than ever, in 2016. **We can win this thing. We just need your help.** [Your donation of any size will make a big difference](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507262:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r). In liberty, Doug Stafford | | [$25 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507262:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r)
---
[$50 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507262:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r)
[$75 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507264:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r)
[$100 MONEYBOMB >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507262:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32507265:WSuxI3yN1:m:1:879035888:66D408CA1A88E67976007ED174839D58:r)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Can you join us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
I think we'll shock the world in Iowa.
And here's why:
Our campaign has been building momentum in
the last few months and the reason is clear: I am the only one
standing up to the establishment, debating them on debt, the Fed,
their reckless spending and even more reckless foreign policies.
I've taken on Republicans and Democrats to
support common sense policies restore fiscal sanity.
Now, in living rooms across the country,
Americans are finally seeing a real conversation on the issues
that really matter and I have proven time and time again, I'm the
one true conservative in this race.
It's really resonating with the people. It's
really resonating with Iowans. And I know if we keep getting our
message out there, we will not only win Iowa, we will with the
nomination.
We just have to take advantage of the
momentum.
My team set up an end-of-year moneybomb for
this week to help capitalize on our growing strength and prove to
the naysayers that 2016 will be even stronger than 2015.
Can you join our moneybomb today?
Let's turn this momentum into something real
that helps us keep rising in the polls and winning in the early
primary states.
I hope I can count on you to stand with me.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Here we go!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT [www
body:
Courageous Conservatives \- Reigniting the Promise of America
**Hello Friend,**
I hope you had a very merry Christmas yesterday and enjoyed the opportunity to relax with family, friends, and loved ones. Because now, we're moving into high(er) gear. We're less than one week away from New Year's Day, which is important for two reasons: number one, it means we're only a few short months away from the nominating conventions where we will make Ted our republican nominee to win the White House in November, and number two, _**it means we're just one month away from the Iowa caucuses!**_
Because of your support, _**we're ready**_. As of the last fundraising reports, we have more money in the bank than any other republican campaign, we have county chairmen in the 171 counties that make up the first four primary and caucus states, we have congressional district coordinators in all 163 congressional districts that comprise the 24 states that hold their primaries or caucuses before March 15th, and we have over 160,000 courageous conservatives signed up as volunteers who are ready to get to work! (_**[By the way, if you still haven't signed up to volunteer yet, you may do so here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32510028:WaXSH3ywN:m:1:1104269936:ECE32124360B9B18461294FEFA9E4425:r)**_)
We're making terrific progress in the run-up to Iowa. Camp Cruz has been open for a few weeks now, and our volunteers are doing a tremendous job working 12 hour shifts and blowing past their nightly phone call and door knocking goals. I know Bryan English, our Iowa State Director, couldn't be more pleased. Well, actually, there is one thing we could do to make him even more happy -- and that's to open a second set of dorms for Camp Cruz to house even more volunteers. And that's exactly what we're doing! And we're taking the model to other early states too! This past week, we were happy to announce that we are taking the strike force to New Hampshire. **[If you'd be interested in deploying to New Hampshire to volunteer, you may sign up here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32510029:WaXSH3ywN:m:1:1104269936:ECE32124360B9B18461294FEFA9E4425:r)**.
Also, speaking of Iowa, we're running a new TV ad in the Hawkeye state that I wanted to make sure [you saw and had a chance to share with your friends](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32510030:WaXSH3ywN:m:1:1104269936:ECE32124360B9B18461294FEFA9E4425:r):
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32510030:WaXSH3ywN:m:1:1104269936:ECE32124360B9B18461294FEFA9E4425:r)
The ad highlights just some of the fights in which Ted has led and won -- fights such as defending the Ten Commandments monument that still stands at the Texas Capitol today, defending our Second Amendment right to keep and bear arms, and defending the words "under God" in the pledge of allegiance. **[I hope you'll watch the ad here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32510030:WaXSH3ywN:m:1:1104269936:ECE32124360B9B18461294FEFA9E4425:r)**.
Americans are hungry for a president who will tell the truth and, once elected, does what he said he would do. There's one man that fits the bill -- Ted Cruz. That's exactly why Ted was [greeted by crowds of thousands of enthusiastic courageous conservatives](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32510031:WaXSH3ywN:m:1:1104269936:ECE32124360B9B18461294FEFA9E4425:r) at stop after stop during our #CruzCountry Christmas Tour that took us through several March 1 SEC Primary States, and that's why we're seeing the buildup in momentum over recent weeks. We're increasing in the polls, we're recruiting thousands of volunteers and supporters, and we're raising the money it will take to win this race.
And we wouldn't be here today without you, so thank you, and on to victory!
**Jeff Roe**
**Campaign Manager**
**Cruz for President**

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Can Bernie count you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#
# Can Bernie count you in?
The latest polls show we are within striking distance in Iowa and leading in New Hampshire.
Now we need to go out and win this thing. To win, Bernie needs you to help him get out the vote. With only five weeks until the Iowa caucus, time is running out. **Sign up for a phone bank now:**
****[ ****[ **[Reston Library Phone Bank.:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vtk9)
Monday, December 28th in Reston ** **[Phone Banking at the Arlington Central Library:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vtz3)
Tuesday, December 29th in Arlington ** ****[ Our plan to win is simple but it will take an enormous amount of work. We need volunteers across the country to help us identify enough Bernie supporters to provide the margin of victory in the first four early voting states. **Calling voters is one of highest impact things you can do to help get Bernie elected.** You don't have to be prepped for a political argument -- just ask folks who they are supporting and then record it in our database so local staff and volunteers can follow up. Can Bernie count you in? Becky Bond
Bernie 2016 P.S. If you can't make it to a phone bank, **[consider making calls on your own from home](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2874/43f17890/4bde591a/6212dce9/3942423742/VEsH/ "http://www.berniesanders.com/phonebank")**.

Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2874/43f17890/4bde591a/6212dc96/3942423742/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2874/43f17890/4bde591a/6212dc97/3942423742/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2874/43f17890/4bde591a/6212dc94/3942423742/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2874/43f17890/4bde591a/6212dc95/3942423742/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: Pledge to vote [dpwillis67@gmail.com: Not Recorded]

body:
| **SIGN YOUR NAME:[Pledge to vote in 2016 ->](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207ae/542483364/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://signforgood.com/debatepledge/?code=boldpac&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**

Polls show the right-wing base is extremely motivated to make sure neither Bernie Sanders nor Hillary Clinton are elected in 2016. That's why it's more important than ever that we make sure every Democrat gets to the polls.

**[We're calling on all Democrats to sign their names and pledge to vote in 2016:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207ae/542483364/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://signforgood.com/debatepledge/?code=boldpac&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")** | ****[SAY YOU'RE IN->](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207ae/542483364/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://signforgood.com/debatepledge/?code=boldpac&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")****
---
Friends,

As 2016 approaches, it's already clear this will be one of the most critical elections in recent history.

With just months to go before the Presidential Primaries, Donald Trump continues to lead in the polls by a disturbingly wide margin. And every time he says something offensive or proposes a new plan targeting minority groups, his poll numbers only seem to climb.

Trump's success makes it evident just how extreme the modern Republican Party has become.

**With everything that President Obama and the Democrats have worked for hanging in the balance, it 's more important than ever that we commit to getting __ every Democrat to the polls in 2016.**

[Click here to pledge to vote in 2016 ->](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207ae/542483364/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://signforgood.com/debatepledge/?code=boldpac&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")

Look, Democrats suffered devastating and historic losses in 2014, losing not only the majority in the Senate but giving up the largest majority in the House in over 70 years!

Republicans are looking to capitalize on these losses in 2016 by building a massive campaign machine to solidify and even expand their hold over Congress. _And the only thing stopping them is your vote._

**[That's why we're asking every Democrat to sign their name TODAY to pledge to vote in 2016:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207ae/542483364/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://signforgood.com/debatepledge/?code=boldpac&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**

[http://go.boldpac.com/Pledge-to-Vote](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207ae/542483364/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://signforgood.com/debatepledge/?code=boldpac&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")

Onward,

_BOLD PAC_

|

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---

This message was sent to: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207af/542483364/VEsB/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information")** | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207af/542483364/VEsO/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information").

CHC Bold PAC is the voice for Latinos in American politics. We are committed to representing the values of the Latino community and increasing the diversity of our leadership in the House and Senate.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to elect candidates passionate about issues that impact the Latino community, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207ac/542483364/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea777/e60883a/71d0b827/144207ac/542483364/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts to elect diverse Democrats, please [click here](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=").

_From the entire BOLD PAC team, thanks for your support!_

**[DONATE>>](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQzMzM2ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNjQ5Njc1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjQzMzM2ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNjQ5Njc1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQzMzM2ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNjQ5Njc1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQzMzM2ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNjQ5Njc1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQzMzM2ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNjQ5Njc1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQzMzM2ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNjQ5Njc1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjQzMzM2ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNjQ5Njc1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQzMzM2ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyNjQ5Njc1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
